message.content:
## Task 7 수정사항 최종 검증

작업 디렉토리: `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2`

아래 5개 파일의 수정이 올바르게 적용되었는지 확인하라. **추가 수정 없이 검증만** 한다.

## 검증 항목

### 1. `features/inspection/types.ts`
- `createdAt`가 `string` 타입인지 (Date 아님)
- `updatedAt`가 `string` 타입인지 (Date 아님)

### 2. `features/inspection/actions.ts`
- `await requireAdmin()`이 try 블록 **바깥**에 있는지

### 3. `features/inspection/components/InspectionSearchForm.tsx`
- `useState`의 초기값이 `'ALL'`인지 (빈 문자열 아님)
- `<SelectItem value="ALL">전체</SelectItem>` 형태인지
- handleSearch에서 `'ALL'`일 때 searchParam 제외 로직 있는지

### 4. `features/inspection/components/InspectionDetailPanel.tsx`
- `handleUpdate` 함수 하나로 통합되었는지 (handleApprove/handleReject 제거)
- 승인/반려 버튼이 `handleUpdate(...)` 호출하는지

### 5. `features/inspection/components/InspectionTable.tsx`
- status 컬럼이 `cellRenderer`로 `<Badge>` 렌더링하는지

## 출력 형식

각 항목을 ✅/❌로 표시하고, 모두 통과하면 "✅ Task 7 최종 승인" 출력.

- understand-anything:understand
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

7	import type { InspectionItem } from '@/features/inspection/types'
8	
9	interface InspectionTableProps {
10	    items: InspectionItem[]
11	    onRowClick: (item: InspectionItem) => void
12	}
13	
14	const TARGET_TYPE_LABEL: Record<string, string> = {
15	    WORD: '단어',
16	    TERM: '용어',
17	}
18	
19	const columnDefs: ColDef<InspectionItem>[] = [
20	    { field: 'id', headerName: '번호', width: 80 },
21	    {
22	        field: 'targetType',
23	        headerName: '대상 유형',
24	        width: 100,
25	        valueFormatter: (params: ValueFormatterParams<InspectionItem, string>) =>
26	            TARGET_TYPE_LABEL[params.value ?? ''] ?? params.value ?? '',
27	    },
28	    { field: 'targetId', headerName: '대상 ID', width: 100 },
29	    {
30	        field: 'status',
31	        headerName: '상태',
32	        width: 100,
33	        cellRenderer: (params: ICellRendererParams<InspectionItem, InspectionItem['status']>) => {
34	            const value = params.value
35	            if (value === 'APPROVED') return <Badge variant="default">승인</Badge>
36	            if (value === 'REJECTED') return <Badge variant="destructive">반려</Badge>
37	            return <Badge variant="outline">대기</Badge>
38	        },
39	    },
40	    {
41	        field: 'comment',
42	        headerName: '검수 의견',
43	        flex: 1,
44	        valueFormatter: (params: ValueFormatterParams<InspectionItem, string | null>) =>
45	            params.value ?? '-',
46	    },
47	    {
48	        field: 'createdAt',
49	        headerName: '등록일',
50	        width: 120,
51	        valueFormatter: (params: ValueFormatterParams<InspectionItem, Date>) =>
52	            params.value ? format(new Date(params.value), 'yyyy-MM-dd') : '',
53	    },
54	]
55	
56	export function InspectionTable({ items, onRowClick }: InspectionTableProps) {
57	    return (
58	        <DataTable<InspectionItem>
59	            columnDefs={columnDefs}
60	            rowData={items}
61	            onRowClick={onRowClick}
62	        />
63	    )
64	}
65

content.text:
5개 파일 모두 확인 완료. 검증 결과:

---

## Task 7 최종 검증 결과

### 1. `features/inspection/types.ts`
- ✅ `createdAt`가 `string` 타입 (line 8: `createdAt: string`)
- ✅ `updatedAt`가 `string` 타입 (line 9: `updatedAt: string`)

### 2. `features/inspection/actions.ts`
- ✅ `await requireAdmin()`이 try 블록 **바깥**에 있음 (line 12, try는 line 13~)

### 3. `features/inspection/components/InspectionSearchForm.tsx`
- ✅ `useState` 초기값이 `'ALL'` (line 22~23: `defaultTargetType ?? 'ALL'`, `defaultStatus ?? 'ALL'`)
- ✅ `<SelectItem value="ALL">전체</SelectItem>` 형태 존재 (line 48, 62)
- ✅ handleSearch에서 `'ALL'`일 때 searchParam 제외 로직 있음 (line 27~28: `targetType !== 'ALL'`, `status !== 'ALL'`)

### 4. `features/inspection/components/InspectionDetailPanel.tsx`
- ✅ `handleUpdate` 함수 하나로 통합 (line 41), `handleApprove`/`handleReject` 없음
- ✅ 승인 버튼: `onClick={() => handleUpdate('APPROVED')}` (line 135)
- ✅ 반려 버튼: `onClick={() => handleUpdate('REJECTED', rejectComment || undefined)}` (line 118)

### 5. `features/inspection/components/InspectionTable.tsx`
- ✅ status 컬럼이 `cellRenderer`로 `<Badge>` 렌더링 (line 32~39: `cellRenderer` 내 APPROVED/REJECTED/PENDING 분기)

---

## ✅ Task 7 최종 승인

5개 파일, 10개 검증 항목 전부 통과.
